'''鈭歯-ch-ch''' ('''nachacha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quinine|quinine]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-ch-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quinine|quinine]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯-ch-ch
|-
! Lemma
| nachacha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:nachachithi|nachachithi]] || [[word:nachachiji|nachachiji]] || [[word:nachachishi|nachachishi]] || [[word:nachachi|nachachi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nachachuthuth|nachachuthuth]] || [[word:nachachujuj|nachachujuj]] || [[word:nachachushush|nachachushush]] || [[word:nachach|nachach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nachachuthu|nachachuthu]] || [[word:nachachuju|nachachuju]] || [[word:nachachushu|nachachushu]] || [[word:nachachu|nachachu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nachachufuth|nachachufuth]] || [[word:nachachufuj|nachachufuj]] || [[word:nachachufush|nachachufush]] || [[word:nachachuf|nachachuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:nachachethe|nachachethe]] || [[word:nachacheje|nachacheje]] || [[word:nachacheshe|nachacheshe]] || [[word:nachache|nachache]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nachachothoth|nachachothoth]] || [[word:nachachojoj|nachachojoj]] || [[word:nachachoshosh|nachachoshosh]] || [[word:nachach|nachach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nachachotho|nachachotho]] || [[word:nachachojo|nachachojo]] || [[word:nachachosho|nachachosho]] || [[word:nachacho|nachacho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nachachofoth|nachachofoth]] || [[word:nachachofoj|nachachofoj]] || [[word:nachachofosh|nachachofosh]] || [[word:nachachof|nachachof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:nachach忙th忙|nachach忙th忙]] || [[word:nachach忙j忙|nachach忙j忙]] || [[word:nachach忙sh忙|nachach忙sh忙]] || [[word:nachach忙|nachach忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nachachathath|nachachathath]] || [[word:nachachajaj|nachachajaj]] || [[word:nachachashash|nachachashash]] || [[word:nachach|nachach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nachachatha|nachachatha]] || [[word:nachachaja|nachachaja]] || [[word:nachachasha|nachachasha]] || [[word:nachacha|nachacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nachachafath|nachachafath]] || [[word:nachachafaj|nachachafaj]] || [[word:nachachafash|nachachafash]] || [[word:nachachaf|nachachaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:nachachasha|nachachasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gonachachasha|gonachachasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokinachachasha|gokinachachasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:nachachn眉sha|nachachn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gonachachnkn眉sha|gonachachnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokinachachn眉sha|gokinachachn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nachachsh毛sha|nachachsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonachachnksh毛sha|gonachachnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinachachsh毛sha|gokinachachsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nachachrosha|nachachrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonachachnkrosha|gonachachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinachachrosha|gokinachachrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nachachmusha|nachachmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gonachachnkmusha|gonachachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinachachmusha|gokinachachmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:nachachsherasha|nachachsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gonachachnksherasha|gonachachnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokinachachsherasha|gokinachachsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:nachachngasha|nachachngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gonachachnkngasha|gonachachnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokinachachngasha|gokinachachngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nachachyasha|nachachyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gonachachnkyasha|gonachachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokinachachyasha|gokinachachyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:nachachyamasha|nachachyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gonachachnkyamasha|gonachachnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokinachachyamasha|gokinachachyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:nachachn眉sh毛sha|nachachn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gonachachnkn眉sh毛sha|gonachachnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokinachachn眉sh毛sha|gokinachachn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:nachachn眉rosha|nachachn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonachachnkn眉rosha|gonachachnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinachachn眉rosha|gokinachachn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nachachn眉musha|nachachn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonachachnkn眉musha|gonachachnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinachachn眉musha|gokinachachn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:nachachsh毛n眉sha|nachachsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gonachachnksh毛n眉sha|gonachachnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokinachachsh毛n眉sha|gokinachachsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:nachachsh毛rosha|nachachsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonachachnksh毛rosha|gonachachnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinachachsh毛rosha|gokinachachsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nachachsh毛musha|nachachsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonachachnksh毛musha|gonachachnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinachachsh毛musha|gokinachachsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:nachachron眉sha|nachachron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gonachachnkron眉sha|gonachachnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokinachachron眉sha|gokinachachron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:nachachrosh毛sha|nachachrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gonachachnkrosh毛sha|gonachachnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokinachachrosh毛sha|gokinachachrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nachachromusha|nachachromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonachachnkromusha|gonachachnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinachachromusha|gokinachachromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:nachachmun眉sha|nachachmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gonachachnkmun眉sha|gonachachnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokinachachmun眉sha|gokinachachmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:nachachmush毛sha|nachachmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gonachachnkmush毛sha|gonachachnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokinachachmush毛sha|gokinachachmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:nachachmurosha|nachachmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonachachnkmurosha|gonachachnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinachachmurosha|gokinachachmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:nachach|nachach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n忙ch忙ch|n忙ch忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:honachach|honachach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hon忙ch忙ch|hon忙ch忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohonachach|hohonachach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohon忙ch忙ch|hohon忙ch忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉nachach|n眉nachach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉n忙ch忙ch|n眉n忙ch忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉nachach|n眉n眉nachach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉n忙ch忙ch|n眉n眉n忙ch忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂nachach|n茂nachach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂n忙ch忙ch|n茂n忙ch忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂nachach|n茂n茂nachach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂n忙ch忙ch|n茂n茂n忙ch忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lunachach|lunachach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lun忙ch忙ch|lun忙ch忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulunachach|lulunachach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulun忙ch忙ch|lulun忙ch忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:linachach|linachach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lin忙ch忙ch|lin忙ch忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilinachach|lilinachach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilin忙ch忙ch|lilin忙ch忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:konachach|konachach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kon忙ch忙ch|kon忙ch忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokonachach|kokonachach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokon忙ch忙ch|kokon忙ch忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kenachach|kenachach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ken忙ch忙ch|ken忙ch忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekenachach|kekenachach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:keken忙ch忙ch|keken忙ch忙ch]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
